items.title: Bummer for the show but will be cool to see Garrett’s next chapter play out.
items.author: Blake Murphy
items.body_excerpt:
Bummer for the show but will be cool to see Garrett’s next chapter play out.

He had considered still playing, coaching, front office, and law in the past. Obviously has a ton to teach, now as a coach instead of teammate.

media.title: Heat’s Conwell gives summer debut his best shot, and just keeps shooting
